Container.Name: yourapp-aio
Container.Overview: Replace this overview with the real app description and first-run guidance.
Container.Changes: ### 2026-05-05 - Generated from CHANGELOG.md during release preparation. Do not edit manually. - Harden apt package installs - Gate publishes on template tests and CI - Optimize pytest gating and Trunk uploads - Simplify template workflow defaults - Simplify template workflow graph - Replace blocked sync action - Skip unsupported dependency review - Install template validation deps - Capture integration diagnostics on pytest failure - Remove automation flag and align release flow - Standardize fleet tool configuration - Consume shared fleet plugin config - Pin releases to target commits - Consolidate pytest workflow steps - Use shared AIO workflows (#21) - Pin shared validation policy - Use shared AIO workflows - Sync workflow path filters - Sync catalog publication state - Pin publish helper workflow fix - Pin Docker Hub primary workflow - Pin control-plane workflow foundation - Update pytest and trunk analytics uploader - Update non-major infrastructure updates - Add repository guidance - Document central app test dependencies - Add git-cliff release workflow - Align fleet scaffold with current standards - Support suite components - Expose manual publish targets - Tighten changelog spacing - Make releases manual and gate heavy workflows - Harden manual publish workflow - Make derived repo validator portable - Use workflow file selector for CI checks - Classify local action changes - Fail fast on init errors - Avoid template-only integration runs - Sync shared validation and trunk cleanup - Sync release shim path fallback - Prefer Docker Hub image metadata - Sync shared repository boilerplate - Move shared automation to aio-fleet - Declare aio-fleet ownership - Initialize reusable Unraid AIO template - Refine public template docs and checklists - Harden template workflows, upstream tracking, and maintenance policy - Standardize template community defaults - Consolidate CI workflows - Fix awesome-unraid sync for protected main - Simplify template sync defaults - Merge branch 'main' into codex/template-rollup - Merge branch 'main' into codex/fix-awesome-unraid-sync-prs - Add Unraid support thread template - Merge branch 'main' into codex/add-support-thread-template - Switch template CI to pytest and integration tests - Harden template CI, runtime, and XML tooling - Merge branch 'main' into codex/release-target-immutability - Use shared derived repo validation - Use shared release helper shim - Remove legacy shared contract tests - Use docker volumes for runtime persistence - Cover action and container contracts - Use shared runtime contract helpers
Container.Requires: Replace this with any real operational prerequisites or remove it.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Replace with the main app port.

Config.Name: Example Variable
Config.Description: Replace with a real variable or remove it.
